story.title: The song is done. The video isn't.
story.p1: You spent weeks on the writing, the recording, the mix. The track finally sounds right.
story.p2: Now you need something visual — something that matches the energy of the song — so people can actually find it and feel it.
story.quote: Hiring a video editor costs too much. Learning After Effects takes too long. And generic templates don't match my sound.
story.p3: So the song sits there. Finished, but invisible.
story.solution_left_1: Upload your song. AI handles the transcription, the timing, and the first visual draft — in minutes, not days.
story.solution_left_2: You stay in control of the creative direction. Change the words, the style, the mood. Export when it feels right.

not_magic.title: A real production tool
not_magic.description: Not a one-click gimmick. A lyric video workflow you can trust for a real release.

human.title: AI does the heavy lifting
human.description: Transcription, sync, and rendering are automatic. Your taste and judgment shape the final cut.

creativity.title: Creativity is in
creativity.description: Customize every detail, or keep it simple and move fast.

feature_cards.title: AI Lyric Sync
feature_cards.description: Upload your song and let AI transcribe every line and lock it to the beat. Edit any lyric and fine-tune any timing — in 50+ languages, in minutes, not days.

feature_cards.title: The AI Lyric Video Maker
feature_cards.description: Built for songs, not ads or reels. Start from your lyrics, then make it yours with story prompts, scenes, colors, fonts, and images. No video editing experience required.

feature_cards.title: Export to Your Favorite Editor
feature_cards.description: Finish in the tools you already use. Create your lyric video in minutes, then export to Premiere, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut Pro for advanced editing.

pricing_faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
pricing_faq.description: Clear answers about free credits, one-time packs, subscriptions, and export access.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: Yes. Create a free account to receive signup credits. You can use them to generate, preview, and test the lyric video workflow before choosing a paid plan.

items.question: Can I generate one video without a subscription?
items.answer: Yes. The pricing page supports one-time credit packs for people who only need a single song or a short project. In this first version, purchase buttons route to the create flow.

items.question: How do annual plans work?
items.answer: Annual pricing is shown as 10 months of the monthly price, so you get 2 months free. Credits are still presented as a monthly allowance.

items.question: Can I purchase additional credits?
items.answer: Yes. If you run out of credits, you can choose a one-time credit pack instead of changing your subscription.

items.question: Will unused credits roll over?
items.answer: The public pricing copy presents subscription credits as monthly credits and one-time credits as valid for 1 year. Final rollover rules should match the checkout terms when payments are enabled.

items.question: Do one-time credits include all features?
items.answer: One-time credits unlock Creator-level export features. Pro and Ultra roadmap features remain tied to plan access and availability.

items.question: Can I cancel my subscription?
items.answer: Yes. Subscription controls will live in account settings once live checkout is enabled.

items.question: Do you offer refunds?
items.answer: AI generation costs are consumed during processing, so refund rules should follow the terms shown at checkout.

items.question: Do you offer discounts or promo codes?
items.answer: Discounts can be offered through official campaigns. This first version keeps the pricing page focused on the standard plans and credit packs.

pricing_cta.copy: Your song is ready. Turn it into a lyric video people can watch, share, and remember.

how_it_works.title: How the AI Lyric Video Maker Works

steps.title: Upload your song
steps.description: Drop an MP3, WAV, FLAC, AAC, or OGG file, or paste a link. A free account gives you starter credits, and no manual lyric typing is required. LyricVideoMaker starts from your real audio, not a blank timeline.

steps.title: AI transcribes and syncs
steps.description: AI transcribes lyrics from the audio automatically, detects the beat, and syncs every line to the right moment. It supports 50+ languages, and every lyric line stays editable.

steps.title: Preview and export
steps.description: Preview the full lyric video with your own lyrics and chosen style. Export a watermarked version for YouTube, TikTok, Reels, Shorts, or feed posts — free, no subscription required.

platforms.title: Made for wherever your music lives

items.description: Full-length lyric videos in crisp 16:9 HD. Perfect for lyric channels and official audio uploads.
items.link_text: Learn how to make a YouTube lyric video

items.description: Vertical 9:16 videos with bold, scroll-stopping lyric animations. Optimized for the first 3 seconds.
items.link_text: Try the TikTok lyric video generator

items.description: Square and vertical formats for Reels, Stories, and feed posts. Aesthetic styles that match your grid.

comparison.title: The fastest way to a finished lyric video
comparison.note: Built for one thing — lyric videos — and obsessively good at it.

testimonials.title: How creators use the lyric video maker
testimonials.description: Artists, editors, and release teams use LyricVideoMaker to turn real songs into synced lyric videos for YouTube, TikTok, Reels, and release campaigns.

items.name: Maya R.
items.quote: I uploaded a 3-minute demo and had editable, beat-synced lyrics before I opened my usual video editor. That saved me the whole first pass.

items.name: Jonas K.
items.quote: For client previews, the timing matters most. I can show the artist how every line lands with the beat before we spend time polishing visuals.

items.name: Alina S.
items.quote: The 9:16 preview helps me check whether the hook reads on a phone. I can export a short vertical version and post it the same day.

items.name: Dante V.
items.quote: I prepare 5 lyric videos a week. Starting with automatic transcription and synced lines keeps me out of manual subtitle timing.

items.name: Sora N.
items.quote: When an artist sends a rough track, I use the lyric video maker to get a clean timing base. Then I can spend my time on style and pacing.

items.name: Leah M.
items.quote: For release week, I need YouTube, TikTok, and Reels assets from the same song. Having those formats in one workflow keeps handoff simple.

items.name: Niko P.
items.quote: My tracks rarely have clean pauses, so manual lyric timing gets messy fast. The beat sync gave me a usable first version in one upload.

items.name: Camila T.
items.quote: We test hooks before a release. A synced lyric clip tells us whether the chorus works on Reels before we book a full edit.

items.name: Eli W.
items.quote: I care more about readable words than flashy effects. Uploading the song first kept the video centered on the lyric and the vocal.

items.name: Noor H.
items.quote: The editable lines helped a lot. I fixed two phrases after transcription, previewed the full song, and exported a vertical version for TikTok.

items.name: Marco D.
items.quote: A ten-second preview is easy. Watching the full track with synced lyrics tells me whether the pacing works for a lyrics channel.

items.name: Tia B.
items.quote: I used to skip lyric videos because the setup felt too big. Starting from the audio made it feel like part of finishing the song.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: Everything you need to know before making your first AI lyric video.

free.question: Is this AI lyric video maker free?
free.answer: Yes. Create a free account to get free credits for AI generation, then upload your song, preview the full result, and export a watermarked video for free. Watermark-free exports use paid credits. Save your projects anytime — no subscription, no credit card.

lyrics.question: Do I need to type the lyrics myself?
lyrics.answer: No. Upload your audio and AI transcribes lyrics from the song automatically. You can also paste your own lyrics or edit any line after generation.

formats.question: What audio formats can I upload?
formats.answer: You can upload MP3, WAV, FLAC, AAC, and OGG files. You can also paste a link when you do not want to upload a file.

platforms.question: Can I make videos for TikTok and YouTube?
platforms.answer: Yes. Export 16:9 lyric videos for YouTube, 9:16 videos for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts, or 1:1 versions for feed posts.

languages.question: What languages do you support?
languages.answer: AI lyric transcription supports 50+ languages, including English, Spanish, Portuguese, Japanese, Korean, Hindi, and Mandarin.

commercial.question: Can I use exported lyric videos commercially?
commercial.answer: Yes — your exports are yours, including for monetized and commercial use. Free exports are watermarked; for a watermark-free version, export with paid credits. Make sure you have the rights to the music you upload.

accuracy.question: How accurate is the lyric transcription?
accuracy.answer: 95%+ for clear vocals in supported languages. Every line is editable — click any lyric to fix it before generating your video.

time.question: How long does it take to make a lyric video?
time.answer: About 2 minutes for a typical 3-minute song. Transcription takes around 30 seconds, then rendering starts after you pick a style.

account.question: Do I need an account for free export?
account.answer: Yes, a free account is required. You'll get free credits for AI generation, and you can export for free — free exports include a small watermark, while watermark-free exports are included with paid credits. No subscription or credit card required to start.

phone.question: Does it work on my phone?
phone.answer: Yes, you can open projects in a mobile browser and watch previews or finished videos, but the full creation workflow is better on desktop. Uploading songs, editing lyrics, adjusting visuals, and exporting are much more comfortable on a computer.

free_preview.question: Can I preview my lyric video before paying?
free_preview.answer: Yes. Upload a song, review the AI-synced lyrics, and preview the full lyric video for free before you spend any credits. Credits are used for AI generation — exporting a watermarked video is free.

credits.question: How do credits work?
credits.answer: Credits are used for AI generation. The free plan includes 150 one-time credits; Creator, Pro, and Ultra refill credits every month, and you can buy one-time credit packs anytime. Exporting itself is free — free exports are watermarked, and watermark-free exports use paid credits.

static_video.question: Do simpler videos cost fewer credits?
static_video.answer: Yes. A clean lyric video with synced text over a styled background uses fewer credits than full AI-generated scenes, so your credits go further when you don't need heavy visuals.

models.question: What do premium AI models add?
models.answer: Premium models, included on Pro and Ultra, generate more detailed, higher-quality visuals. Free and Creator use standard models that work well for most lyric videos.

rights.question: Can I use exported videos commercially?
rights.answer: Yes. Your exports are yours to use commercially — monetized channels and paid releases included. Free exports are watermarked; for a watermark-free version, export with paid credits. Just make sure you have the rights to the music you upload.

cta.line1: Your song already has the story.
cta.note: Export a watermarked video free. No subscription. No credit card required.
